title: chlonanthes glabra
intro: Chlonanthes glabra, also known as the White Butterfly Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Chlonanthes glabra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its benefits.
